commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=38363322a597dbe5548f5cf0166cd004b68ef277)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/cli/skills-cli.ts` so skills `list`, `info`, and `check` pass `getRemoteSkillEligibility()` into `buildWorkspaceSkillStatus`.

PR surface: Source +5. Total +5 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main's CLI status path builds local status directly, while the connected remote macOS node state lives in the Gateway/runtime path; I did not run a live paired macOS node here.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] There is a concrete repair path, but it should replace this local-process eligibility lookup with a Gateway-backed CLI status flow rather than polishing the current patch.

target.title: fix(cli): pass remote eligibility to skills CLI commands
target.author: itxaiohanglover

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
